name: Find missing number
category: Solve Problems on Arrays [Easy -> Medium -> Hard]
statement: Given an integer array of size n containing distinct values in the range from 0 to n (inclusive), return the only number missing from the array within this range.
constraints:
• n == nums.length
  • 1 <= n <= 104
  • 0 <= nums[i] <= n
  • All the numbers of nums are unique.

examples.explanation: nums contains 0, 1, 2, 3, 4 thus leaving 5 as the only missing number in the range [0, 5]
nums contains 0, 1, 2, 4, 5, 6 thus leaving 3 as the only missing number in the range [0, 6]
